# Bluewater Associates Limited

> Wirral-based IT, cyber security and digital services partner for UK SMBs. Cyber Essentials and Cyber Essentials Plus in 30 days at a fixed price, with direct access to a certified CE assessor. No subcontracting, no agency hand-offs.

## About

Bluewater Associates Limited is a professional services company registered in England and Wales (Company No. 16663061), ICO registered (ZC156613). The company is headquartered on the Wirral, Merseyside, and delivers services on-site across Merseyside and the North West and remotely UK-wide.

The company is run by two principals:
- Paul McWilliam — Director and IT Security Consultant
- Lynsey Graham — GIAC GSEC and GFACT certified Security Consultant and Forensic Accountant

All work is delivered directly by the Bluewater team. Fixed-price proposals are issued within 48 hours of a discovery call.

## Services

- Cyber Essentials certification (30-day delivery, fixed price, free resubmission on failure)
- Cyber Essentials Plus certification
- Managed IT Support (helpdesk, endpoint management, patching, backup, monitoring)
- IT Audit (risk-ranked, costed findings)
- Microsoft 365 Setup and Hardening (Entra ID, SharePoint, Intune, conditional access)
- Managed Compliance (ongoing certification renewal and policy management)
- Website Design and Development
- SEO (technical, local, content)
- Web Applications and Portal Development
- Incident Response (breach containment, forensic investigation)
- Financial Fraud Investigation (forensic accounting, evidence-ready reporting)
- Free AI Opportunity Assessment (2-minute workflow analysis, estimated savings)
